ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team associated with the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "player_dob" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "player_height" REAL /* Player's height in inches */,
  "player_weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in pounds */,
  "player_handedness" TEXT /* Player's throwing and batting handedness */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* More detailed position */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Player's current status */,
  "player_bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pitches_stats" (
  "pitches" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the pitch type */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who threw the pitch */,
  "total_pitches" INTEGER /* Total number of pitches thrown */,
  "pitch_percent" REAL /* Percentage of pitches */,
  "ba" REAL /* Batting average against the player */,
  "iso" REAL /* Isolated power statistic against the player */,
  "babip" REAL /* Batting average on balls in play */,
  "slg" REAL /* Slugging percentage against the player */,
  "woba" REAL /* Weighted on-base average against the player */,
  "xwoba" REAL /* Expected weighted on-base average against the player */,
  "pitch_type" TEXT /* Type of pitch */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season in which the statistics were recorded */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "inning" INTEGER /* Inning of the game */,
  "outs" INTEGER /* Number of outs when the pitch was thrown */,
  "runners" TEXT /* Base situation */,
  "pitch_result" TEXT /* Result of the pitch */,
  "pitch_count" INTEGER /* Total number of pitches thrown in the game */,
  "strike_count" INTEGER /* Total number of strikes thrown in the game */,
  "ball_count" INTEGER /* Total number of balls thrown in the game */,
  "inning_pitch_count" INTEGER /* Number of pitches thrown in the inning */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pitches"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitches_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pitching_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the metric record */,
  "pitches" INTEGER /* Reference to the pitch */,
  "launch_speed" REAL /* Speed at which the pitch was thrown */,
  "launch_angle" REAL /* Angle at which the pitch was launched */,
  "spin_rate" INTEGER /* Spin rate of the pitch in RPM */,
  "velocity" REAL /* Velocity of the pitch in MPH */,
  "effective_speed" REAL /* Effective speed of the pitch accounting for pitch type */,
  "pitch_type" TEXT /* Type of pitch */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "inning" INTEGER /* Inning of the game */,
  "outs" INTEGER /* Number of outs when the pitch was thrown */,
  "runners" TEXT /* Base situation */,
  "pitch_result" TEXT /* Result of the pitch */,
  "pitch_count" INTEGER /* Total number of pitches thrown in the game */,
  "strike_count" INTEGER /* Total number of strikes thrown in the game */,
  "ball_count" INTEGER /* Total number of balls thrown in the game */,
  "inning_pitch_count" INTEGER /* Number of pitches thrown in the inning */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitching_metrics_pitches FOREIGN KEY ("pitches") REFERENCES pitches_stats ("pitches")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Total number of hits */,
  "abs" INTEGER /* Total number of at-bats */,
  "whiffs" INTEGER /* Total number of whiffs */,
  "swings" INTEGER /* Total number of swings */,
  "takes" INTEGER /* Total number of takes */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (Win/Loss) */,
  "inning" INTEGER /* Inning of the game */,
  "outs" INTEGER /* Number of outs when the performance was recorded */,
  "runners" TEXT /* Base situation */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Total number of strikeouts */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Total number of walks */,
  "earned_runs" INTEGER /* Total number of earned runs */,
  "unearned_runs" INTEGER /* Total number of unearned runs */,
  "pitches_thrown" INTEGER /* Total number of pitches thrown in the performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pitching_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the position record */,
  "pitches" INTEGER /* Reference to the pitch */,
  "pos3_start_distance" REAL /* Starting distance from home plate for position 3 */,
  "pos4_start_distance" REAL /* Starting distance from home plate for position 4 */,
  "pos5_start_distance" REAL /* Starting distance from home plate for position 5 */,
  "pos6_start_distance" REAL /* Starting distance from home plate for position 6 */,
  "pos7_start_distance" REAL /* Starting distance from home plate for position 7 */,
  "pos8_start_distance" REAL /* Starting distance from home plate for position 8 */,
  "pos9_start_distance" REAL /* Starting distance from home plate for position 9 */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "inning" INTEGER /* Inning of the game */,
  "outs" INTEGER /* Number of outs when the position was recorded */,
  "runners" TEXT /* Base situation */,
  "pitch_result" TEXT /* Result of the pitch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitching_positions_pitches FOREIGN KEY ("pitches") REFERENCES pitches_stats ("pitches")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (Win/Loss) */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Away team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "umpires" TEXT /* Names of the umpires */,
  "pitch_count" INTEGER /* Total number of pitches thrown in the game */,
  "inning_pitch_counts" TEXT /* Pitch counts for each inning */,
  "inning_results" TEXT /* Results for each inning */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to (e.g., MLB) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Stadium capacity */,
  "team_founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_arena" TEXT /* Name of the team's practice facility */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach is associated with */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach */,
  "coach_dob" TEXT /* Coach's date of birth */,
  "coach_bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the coach */,
  "coach_experience" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  "coach_position" TEXT /* More detailed position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "user_dob" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the user */,
  "user_access_level" INTEGER /* Access level */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* User status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
